title: Item Frame Cache
line1: A Minecraft client-side mod that caches item frames locally, ensuring they render correctly even when a server’s simulation distance is low.
line2: The mod was built with Java.

title: Animebox
line1: A full-stack web app for discovering seasonal anime releases and engaging with the community through reviews and ratings.
line2: The website was built using Next.js, TypeScript, TalwindCSS, and Supabase.

title: Palettes
line1: A color palette generator allowing users to generate up to 8 colors, lock specific colors, undo changes, and adjust brightness.
line2: The website was built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
